regimeNotes: NEUTRAL, with the dovish tilt removed after a hot inflation print. May CPI (released Jun 10) came in at 4.2% y/y -- in line with consensus but the highest since Apr 2023 and the THIRD consecutive monthly acceleration, driven by a +23.5% energy spike tied to the Iran conflict. Core CPI 2.9% y/y (monthly +0.2%, slightly below the 0.3% estimate -- the one soft spot). This kills the 'CPI benign = green light' deploy trigger from the prior plan. KEY EVENT RISK: FOMC decision Wed Jun 17 -- the FIRST meeting chaired by newly appointed hawk Kevin Warsh. Market expects a hold at 4.25-4.50%; the year-end-cut base case is now in real doubt and Warsh's tone is the swing factor. Rates: 10Y 4.49% (firm, cut odds fading). DXY 99.81 (USD still soft vs 106+ historically -- tailwind for gold/crypto intact). VIX 19.25 (moderate). S&P 500 ~7,431 holding well; equities resilient despite inflation. Crypto: F&G 18 (Extreme Fear), BTC dominance 56.65%, total mcap 2.27T (flat 24h); BTC ~64.3k rangebound, down ~20% on the month, ETH dominance only 8.84%. CLARITY Act on the Senate calendar (cleared Banking Committee 15-9 May 14) but still needs a 60-vote floor passage + reconciliation; Galaxy puts odds at 60-75% with a likely-August signature -- NOT an imminent catalyst. DECISION: zero trades. The deploy conditions (benign CPI / CLARITY passage) did not fire, and adding risk 3 days before a hawkish-chair FOMC is poor risk/reward. Hold all positions through the Jun 17 decision; 23% cash preserves full optionality to deploy on a dovish surprise or a confirmed crypto sentiment turn.

SPY.thesis: Core US beta; S&P ~7,431 resilient even as cut odds fade. Hold through FOMC.
SPY.invalidationLevel: Sustained break below ~$660 or a decisively hawkish Fed re-pricing.

MSFT.thesis: AI/cloud quality compounder, strong FCF; ~$391 holding well.
MSFT.invalidationLevel: Cloud growth deceleration or AI capex with no ROI; < ~$340.

GOOGL.thesis: Quality cash machine at fair value with AI optionality.
GOOGL.invalidationLevel: Search share erosion to AI rivals; < ~$310.

UNH.thesis: Contrarian defensive value; multiple analyst upgrades (BofA Buy $450, MS $453, JPM $466), FTC insulin settlement clears an overhang, 17th straight dividend raise. Benefiting from rotation out of tech.

TLT.thesis: Long duration as a Fed-cut harvest -- but the thesis is under pressure: hot CPI + hawkish Warsh push cut timing out. On watch.

GLD.thesis: Debasement + tail-risk hedge; soft DXY (99.8) and an energy-driven inflation surge both support gold.
GLD.invalidationLevel: Real yields spike with a strong USD reversal; < ~$350.

BTC.thesis: Core crypto held into Extreme Fear (F&G 18); CLARITY Act a medium-term (not imminent) catalyst; dominant asset at 56.6% dominance.

ETH.thesis: Discounted L1 leader; rotation optionality if alt sentiment turns. ETH dominance still depressed at 8.8%.

SOL.thesis: Small high-beta narrative satellite, sized deliberately small given Extreme Fear.
